value: I understand how frustrating it is to be without your OnePlus 5T for over a week—I'm sorry you're experiencing this delay. To help get this resolved quickly, could you share your order number and let me know what specifically is holding up delivery (for example, is it stuck in transit, pending payment, or something else)? Once I have those details, I'll be able to look into what's happening and work toward getting this sorted for you right away.
